[17:07:21] you: Right, right, right.

[17:08:25] you: So, for example, I have set microphone as cable output, which is going through voice meter, right?
[17:08:38] you: And system audio, as in Discord, that.
[17:08:41] you: But the issue is, it only...
[17:08:43] you: It only picks up two audio inputs, right?
[17:08:46] you: It wouldn't pick up every, you know, person separately.

[17:08:58] you: It loads up with 3.5 gigabytes of VRAM.
